next_step.current_state: Need exact OCR and schema instructions before editing the requested finance documents.
next_step.observation: The inbox-maintenance workflow says to remove the inbox item after completion, and to avoid partial edits if the task is not doable.

next_step.current_state: Need schema for finance records to know frontmatter fields. Then finance lane rules. After that, inspect target files and convert preserving body exactly.
next_step.observation: The OCR workflow defines OCR as extracting visible data from an existing note into YAML frontmatter using the relevant schema.

next_step.current_state: Have OCR and finance schema. Must read finance lane and nested subfolder rulebooks before reading/editing listed records.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read the six target finance files

next_step.current_state: All relevant rulebooks and schema loaded. Now inspect the six requested finance notes to extract visible fields and confirm they can be OCR-structured without guessing.

plan_remaining_steps_brief: Then write updates for all six

plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter updates for six files preserving bodies
next_step.observation: Read the second target purchase record; it contains complete visible bill fields and two line items suitable for schema extraction.

next_step.current_state: All six target records contain complete visible schema fields, so the OCR task is fully supported. Begin writing YAML frontmatter onto each existing note while preserving the exact original body beneath.

Write remaining five updated finance files

function.message: Processed the next inbox note by OCR-structuring the six requested finance records with YAML frontmatter and preserving each original note body verbatim, then deleted the completed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed root and nested AGENTS.MD guidance, inspected 99_system before task work, used OCR workflow plus finance schema, preserved original note bodies exactly during frontmatter migration, and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked for OCR workflow on six specified finance notes. Each of the six target files contained complete visible invoice or bill fields and line items matching the schema in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so I added YAML frontmatter per 99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md while preserving each original body verbatim. Per 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md, I then deleted the processed inbox file after completion.
completed_steps_laconic: write 6 updated finance files with YAML frontmatter
